sql_array: CREATE TABLE moods (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, mood_type mood NOT NULL);
SELECT enum_range_boundary((SELECT mood_type FROM moods WHERE id = 1), NULL) AS mood_range;
SELECT enum_range_boundary(NULL, (SELECT mood_type FROM moods WHERE id = 3)) AS mood_range;
SELECT enum_range_boundary((SELECT mood_type FROM moods WHERE id = 1), (SELECT mood_type FROM moods WHERE id = 2)) AS mood_range;
SELECT enum_range_boundary((SELECT mood_type FROM moods WHERE id = 1), (SELECT mood_type FROM moods WHERE id = 2)) AS mood_range, DATE '2023-01-01' - DATE '2023-01-01' AS date_difference;
CREATE TABLE events (event_date DATE, mood_id INTEGER, FOREIGN KEY (mood_id) REFERENCES moods(id));
SELECT e.event_date, (SELECT enum_range_boundary(NULL, (SELECT mood_type FROM moods WHERE id = e.mood_id)) FROM events e) AS mood_range FROM events e;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS event_count, DATE '2023-12-31' - DATE '2023-01-01' AS year_end_difference, enum_range_boundary(NULL, (SELECT mood_type FROM moods WHERE id = 2)) AS mood_bound FROM events GROUP BY year_end_difference HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
